scope: unblock (partial): only the usage stream is expressible declaratively; latest/historical/currencies remain quarantined for a keyed_object scalar-value gap (see docs.md Known limits)

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: records.keyed_object only explodes object-valued maps; rates is a scalar-valued (CCY->number) map, so every currency is silently skipped (read.go recordsAtKeyed's valObj type-assertion continue branch) rather than emitted as one record per currency

ENGINE_GAP: same scalar-valued keyed_object gap as latest.json, plus the per-date request loop itself (a StreamHook-shaped fan-out over a date range, not a config-driven fan_out id list) has no declarative equivalent
ENGINE_GAP: same scalar-valued keyed_object gap (currency code -> display name string, not an object)
